description: As a Heat-Health Early Warning System Officer for a public health protection agency, produce a July European heatwave synoptic assessment using Panoply and the air temperature and sea level pressure climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/. Use your domain knowledge of subtropical anticyclones and European summer climate to complete the deliverables specified in the brief at ~/Desktop/heatwave_preparedness_brief.txt.

metadata.industry: Public Health Emergency Preparedness / Environmental Epidemiology
